transcript: Speaker A: Are your nurses and hospital staff confident speaking in English with patients? A small communication gap can create confusion, reduce patient satisfaction and impact the quality of care. That's why you have SpeakX Healthcare, the AI-powered English speaking app designed specifically for nurses, caregivers and hospital support staff. With real hospital conversation practice, AI speaking feedback, pronunciation coaching, and healthcare-focused scenarios, your staff can improve their English anytime, anywhere. No classrooms, no scheduling hassles, no fear of making mistakes, just practical speaking practice with an AI coach available 24/7. Whether it's communicating with patients, supporting families, handling emergencies, interacting with international patients and colleagues, SpeakX Healthcare helps healthcare professionals speak with confidence. Empower your healthcare team with stronger communication skills. Start your free 7-day trial with SpeakX Healthcare today.
on_screen_text: Are your nurses and hospital staff confident speaking in English with patients? summary: The ad addresses the communication gap in hospitals due to poor English skills among staff. It introduces SpeakX Healthcare, an AI-powered app designed to help nurses and caregivers practice real-life hospital scenarios. The CTA invites users to start a 7-day free trial.
